evidence: "A very nice adult film, beautifully photographed..."
"How bad can an action film be when it is full of action stars?"
"It was a fun movie, very well made great special effects and a story in there somewhere."
"How many plots from the old shows and movies can you fit into one movie and not have a whole plot?"
"Good cast, fun fast paced movie for a cheap thrill."
"Clones, clones, clones the show starts with a bang and just keeps moving along."
"A very good film, well acted, great costumes and locations..."
"Woody Allen's films have become beautiful feasts for the eyes and ears..."
"Just another well done Woody Allen film..."
"Woody continues to improve his film making..."
"...the costumes, make-up, locations, sound track all resonate in perfect harmony with the film."
"It looked like a dozen or so to me, none of them made sense but it was pretty."
"A very good film, well acted, great costumes and locations, a fabulous story and very moving."
"A sweet film, well worth a view..."

summary: The user enjoys a mix of drama and comedy films, with a preference for fast-paced narratives and high production quality. They show loyalty to Woody Allen's work and appreciate visual and auditory elements in films, often seeking emotional depth in their viewing experiences.
